criteria.reason: Start/status endpoints are implemented, authenticated, deployed, and route checks return 401 without auth.
Background job calls existing optimizer, persists drafts, tracks fixed/failed/manual/remaining, and logs events.
Attempt guard prevents repeated process-local regeneration and tests cover manual review selection.
UI button, limit copy, polling, and post-completion service refresh are implemented and frontend build passes.
Telegram menu callback now starts the backend job through a scoped session.
Existing ai learning event table is used; no migration was introduced.

commands_run: production: docker compose restart app worker
production: unauthenticated POST/GET route checks returned 401
production: docker compose logs and Telegram service status checked
